display_title: Slay the Spire 2:Wongo Customer Appreciation Badge
wikitext:
{{Relic Infobox|Wongo Customer Appreciation Badge|2}}{{R|Wongo Customer Appreciation Badge||2}} is an {{QueryLink|Relics|rarity:Event|Event|2}} {{2|Relics|Relic}} from the {{E|Welcome to Wongo's|2}} event.

== Sources ==
Can only be obtained from {{E|Welcome to Wongo's|2}} event by accumulating 2000 Wongo points.
